meaning: Whether declared CRS/datum matches project requirement across all artifacts. Hard-gate input.

formula_expression: declared_geoid_per_artifact == project_required_geoid AND consistent across artifacts
meaning: Geoid declaration matches project and is internally consistent.

formula_expression: all artifacts declare same height_mode AND matches project_required_height_mode
meaning: Height mode internal consistency + match to project.

formula_expression: declared_projection consistent with survey site bounding box (zone correct)

meaning: Direct artifact evidence — CRS metadata in EXIF/coord-file headers.

formula_expression: when CUSTOMER_SUPPLIED path: customer_supplied_coord_crs declared AND matches project
meaning: Applies only on customer-supplied path; N/A otherwise.

meaning: PPK base-pairing check.
